reasoning: The Baltimore Ravens are the odds-on favorites to win the AFC North for the 2025-2026 season. Sportsbooks list them consistently around -135 to -140, translating to an implied probability of about 57.5-58.3% and a true probability (vig-removed) of approximately 54%. The Polymarket price in mid-May was 0.57, and standard CBS SportsLine projection models give the Ravens >66.7% chance to win. The Bengals are their clearest threat, sitting at +200 to +220 odds (true probability around 30%). Given the injury risk typically inherent with quarterbacks, and the fact the NFL season brings a lot of variance, a probability centered around the vig-adjusted market consensus (0.54-0.56) is heavily justified. No current major injury news to Lamar Jackson exists to lower this below the baseline consensus.
